caveats: Never bulk-accept green Match suggestions — vendor+date must align (amount alone lies)
mirror is_reconciled DRIFTS vs Xero — single-GET BankTransactions/{id} is the only truth; treat every row as candidate until --verify confirms it
verify: not run — mirror is_reconciled UNVERIFIED (drifts vs Xero)
